title: Databricks’ cofounder just raised $20M to be the Switzerland of AI compute
summary: So every AI team now calls five or ten providers on day one just to scrape together chips, as SiliconAngle explains. SkyPilot is a control plane that pools it all into one interface, across 20-plus clouds, neoclouds, Kubernetes, and Slurm.
